# Sai Dutta Abhishek Dash — Full Stack Engineer & AI Specialist

## About
Sai Dutta Abhishek Dash is a Full Stack Engineer & AI Specialist based in Bhubaneswar, India. He builds production-ready applications at the intersection of full-stack engineering, AI/ML, and security. He has delivered 20+ production applications serving thousands of users across diverse domains — AI agents, encryption tools, cloud storage, Discord bots, security tooling, and more.

## Expertise
- **Programming**: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, Rust, Go, Java, C++, Tailwind CSS
- **AI/ML**: TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, LangChain, Hugging Face, Ollama, Google Vertex AI, Mistral AI, Gemini API, OpenCV, NLP
- **DevOps & Cloud**: AWS (Certified), Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Ansible, CI/CD, Vercel, Netlify, Linux
- **Security**: Zero-knowledge encryption, DDoS protection, firewall configuration, secure ML, penetration testing

## Experience
- Freelance Full Stack Developer — Self-Employed (Sep 2025 – Present)
- Associate — Tech Mahindra (Jun 2025 – Sep 2025)
- Machine Learning Engineer Intern — Multiple companies (2024)
- CEO & Co-Founder — RacerNodes (May 2022 – Jul 2023)

## Notable Projects
- **Tooner** — Privacy-first document tokenization for LLMs (tooner.sdad.pro)
- **Binify** — Zero-knowledge encrypted pastebin (bin.sdad.pro)
- **GenieLabs** — AI-powered development platform (genielabs.sdad.pro)
- **Sensory** — Scalable cloud storage (mirror.sdad.pro)
- **PacketBuddy** — Network usage tracker
- **Auralyn** — Discord music bot with integrated Lavalink (auralyn.sdad.pro)
- **AMZRelay** — Amazon non-returnable products finder (Discord bot)

## Credentials
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (2024)
- Amazon Bedrock Getting Started — AWS (2024)
- Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science — GIET University Gunupur (2025)
